title: Moderation Update - Abuse Queue Cleared
body:
Abuse queue triage complete (6 reports reviewed).

Actions Taken:
• Banned: spam_wave_42 (phishing links)
• Banned: toxic_runner (targeted harassment)
• Warned: bot_like_user_77 (suspicious automation)

No Action (Trusted Members / Low Severity):
• trusted_helper (dispute - trusted member)
• core_maintainer (false positive - brigading)
• new_member_17 (formatting - low severity)

Queue cleared. Report responsibly.
